problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of DNA. DNA computing for massively parallel search directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
